channel.title: AI Glossary Updates | askSarah.ai
channel.description: New terms added to the AI Visibility and AEO Glossary by Sarah Evans, Partner at Zen Media. Covering AEO, GEO, earned media, AI strategy, and original frameworks.

item.title: 56 Terms Now Defined: AI Notices, Dual Pathway PR, Vibe Coding, Shadow AI and More
item.dc:creator: Sarah Evans
item.description:
The AI Glossary at askSarah.ai now covers 56 terms spanning AEO, GEO, AI strategy, PR, LinkedIn, and the AI economy. New additions this update include:

  • AI Notices — citations and brand mentions inside AI-generated answers (naming credit: Gab Ferree)
  • Dual Pathway PR — Sarah Evans' framework combining traditional earned media with GEO and AEO
  • Answer Share — updated definition: composite data grouping measuring AI citation probability
  • Vibe Coding — building software through natural language conversation with AI
  • Shadow AI — employees using unauthorized AI tools; governance and communications risk
  • AI Slop — low-quality AI-generated content published at scale
  • AI Washing — overstating or fabricating AI capabilities in marketing and communications
  • Deepfake — synthetic media using AI to replace a person's likeness or voice
  • Dark Social — private content sharing invisible to standard analytics
  • E-E-A-T — Google's quality framework: Experience, Expertise, Authoritativeness, Trustworthiness
  • Jagged Frontier — the uneven, unpredictable nature of AI capability (Stanford/HBS concept)
  • RAG, MCP, LLM, Agentic AI — foundational AI infrastructure terms for business leaders

View the full glossary

item.title: Glossary Launched: 30 Core Terms in AI Visibility, AEO, and Earned Media
item.dc:creator: Sarah Evans
item.description:
Launching the AI Glossary at askSarah.ai — every term you need to navigate AEO, GEO, earned media, and the AI economy.

Initial glossary covers: AEO, GEO, The Before Layer, Answer Share, AI Notices, Citation Share, Zero-Click Search, llms.txt, Agentic Engine Optimization, Topical Authority, Structured Content, Pillar Page, Earned Media, Owned Media, Share of Voice, Perplexity, Brand Radar, Depth Score, Super-Commenter Strategy, Multi-Model Stack, Generative Relevance Scoring, Context Signals, Token Budget, Unified AEO/SEO Strategy, and more.

View the full glossary
